wrote:

> Another flawless round of hers brought the US the
> silver medal.  The Dutch
> were 1st and the Germans third.
> 
> She is still 1st going into Saturday but everyone is
> breathing down her back
> and it will be incredibly hard to hold on. 
> 
> She and Authentic were the only only pair in all the
> Nation's cup!

--- "Wexner, Abigail" AWexner@Limitedbrands.com
wrote:

Another flawless round of hers brought the US the
silver medal. The Dutch
were 1st and the Germans third.

She is still 1st going into Saturday but everyone is
breathing down her back
and it will be incredibly hard to hold on.

She and Authentic were the only only pair in all the
Nation's cup!
